Every disease has an 'Achilles' heel,' says Robert J. Rowen, M.D. 'And this hidden weakness can be used to defeat it without dangerous drugs or painful surgery.'

fssit_candidates.statement: Every disease has an 'Achilles' heel,' and this hidden weakness can be used to defeat it without dangerous drugs or painful surgery.

The Achilles' heel of heart disease. A little-known enzyme has been found in those who have healthy arteries no matter how they eat. Stimulate this enzyme and it strips deadly plaque from your arteries as if they were made of Teflon.
Cancer's downfall is its love of iron, which it must have to reproduce. On page 9, you'll find out how to take advantage of this hidden weakness and trick cancer cells into self-destructing.

A stroke's weak link is life-giving oxygen, which rapidly rejuvenates damaged cells. Dr. Rowen reveals how to reverse stroke damage - even up to five years afterward - by getting that oxygen quickly to where it's needed most.
Why the 'no pain, no gain' approach is a prescription for failure. How to shatter any personal obstacle without willpower or determination.

Cardiologists are locked into a mindset of cut, burn and poison. They don't know and cannot be told that heart disease is nothing more than an unrecognized form of malnutrition or a specialized form of starvation.

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: Opening with master framework (Achilles' heel concept), then specific disease examples throughout body

key_quotes: One Day, All Doctors Will Be Using These Powerful New Cutting-Edge Cures
Thousands Flock to This California M.D. to be Healed by his 'Medicine of the Future'
The doctor of tomorrow is today's foremost pioneer of bold, innovative, unconventional healing methods
You can actually see the plaque leaving! Many patients report 'greasy stools' while taking EPL.
Please don't ever let a doctor tell you that stroke damage is 'irreversible.' That won't be true in the future. And it doesn't have to be true for you today!
